roles.description: Human-actor authority to curate / annotate / ingest corpus documents (D53 §B Sana-style instantiation; see also generic-shape author role).
Human-actor authority to query the corpus + cite retrieved chunks.
Agent-actor authority for synthesis-claim emission (the kb-agent's role when proposing write-back content; subject to pre-citation hook).

hooks.name: pre-event-emit
hooks.purpose: Substrate-fired before event append (substrate.py:219 per D47 §B.2); SanaKnowledgeShape installs pre-citation-impl logic here — for claim events emitted with role=author by an agent-actor, requires non-empty payload.evidence-references with every reference resolving to a known prior action outcome-reference; raise → EventRejected(category=hook-handler) per D47 §B.2.

hooks.name: post-event-emit
hooks.purpose: Substrate-fired after event append (substrate.py:249 per D47 §B.2); SanaKnowledgeShape installs post-corpus-write-impl logic here — captures outcome-references from emitted action events into shape state so subsequent pre-citation checks can validate evidence-references.

hooks.name: pre-citation
hooks.purpose: Semantic declaration (D13 hooks list); concrete enforcement runs inside pre-event-emit handler per D47 §B.2 substrate-fired lifecycle. Validates an emitted synthesis-claim event's evidence-references resolve to prior retrieve-action outcome-references in the chain. D38 §3 hook-based knowledge discipline.

hooks.name: post-corpus-write
hooks.purpose: Semantic declaration (D13 hooks list); concrete enforcement runs inside post-event-emit handler — records outcome-references for downstream pre-citation resolution. Projects synthesis claim into corpus state (Phase B: in-memory; Phase C: knowledge-writer adapter call). D38 §2 framing of workspace state event projections carrying assertional content.
